Description (Key Objective): Integrity, ethics, board oversight, structure, competence, accountability
Key Examples / Policies: Ethics/Code of Conduct, Security Policy, HR/Onboarding Policy, Termination User Policy
Typical Audit Evidence: Signed policies, org chart, board minutes, training records, background checks
Meeting minutes, policy distribution logs, external privacy notices
Risk register, annual risk assessment, fraud risk analysis

Key Examples / Policies: Internal audits, user access reviews, monitoring dashboards
Typical Audit Evidence: Monitoring logs, access review reports, deficiency remediation tracker

Description (Key Objective): Control selection, technology general controls, policies/procedures
Key Examples / Policies: Change Management Policy, Segregation of Duties Policy

Description (Key Objective): Access provisioning, least privilege, SoD, physical security, malware protection
Key Examples / Policies: MFA, endpoint management, physical access logs, termination policy
Typical Audit Evidence: Access request/approval tickets, quarterly access reviews, offboarding checklists, anti-malware reports

Key Examples / Policies: Incident Response Plan, Business Continuity/Disaster Recovery Plan
Typical Audit Evidence: Incident logs, tabletop exercise results, backup test reports
Change tickets with test evidence, approval, separate implementer

Key Examples / Policies: Vendor risk assessments, cyber insurance, BCP
Typical Audit Evidence: Vendor questionnaires, insurance certificates, risk treatment plans
